name: Animal Shapes

effects.description: Choose any number of willing creatures that you can see within range. Each target shape-shifts into a Large or smaller Beast of your choice that has a Challenge Rating of 4 or lower. You can choose a different form for each target. On later turns, you can take a Magic action to transform the targets again. A target's game statistics are replaced by the chosen Beast's statistics, but the target retains its creature type; Hit Points; Hit Point Dice; alignment; ability to communicate; and Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores. The target's actions are limited by the Beast form's anatomy, and it can't cast spells. The target's equipment melds into the new form, and the target can't use any of that equipment while in that form. The target gains a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to the Hit Points of the first form into which it shape-shifts. These Temporary Hit Points vanish if any remain when the spell ends. The transformation lasts for the duration or until the target ends it as a Bonus Action.

grantedActions.action: Transform the spell targets again into eligible Beast forms.
grantedActions.notes: The granted action is available on later turns while the spell remains active.

controlOptions.name: Beast form
controlOptions.effect: Each willing target shape-shifts into a Large or smaller Beast with Challenge Rating 4 or lower.
controlOptions.details: The caster can choose a different eligible form for each target.

controlOptions.name: Repeat transformation
controlOptions.effect: On later turns, the caster can take a Magic action to transform the targets again.
controlOptions.details: Runtime maxTargets uses the explicit unlimited sentinel because the canonical prose allows any number of willing visible targets in range.

controlOptions.name: Stat replacement
controlOptions.effect: The target uses the chosen Beast statistics but retains creature type, Hit Points, Hit Point Dice, alignment, communication, and Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores.
controlOptions.details: The target cannot cast spells and its actions are limited by the Beast form anatomy.

controlOptions.name: Equipment merge
controlOptions.effect: The target equipment melds into the form and cannot be used while transformed.

effects.description: Each target gains Temporary Hit Points equal to the Hit Points of the first form into which it shape-shifts. These Temporary Hit Points vanish if any remain when the spell ends.
